author: @bostonbob0007
text:
Well in 1993 hospitals were very expensive. We had complications with our first child and lost our son only 6 months old. About 3 months later the mail lady knocked on our door because it wouldn't fit in the mailbox. It was from the hospital that we thought it was something we had left behind. We opened it up 3 1/2 inches of paperwork we couldn't believe this was happening. We looked at the last page with the total of $1.2+ million with company insurance. How was this so much money?  
Remember we lost our son 3 months ago and my wife was recovering from an emergency removal of our son. Losing a child is the most painful thing anyone can experience even now in 2026. So at 22- 24, we were in the hole for 1.2+ million dollars so we had to file for bankruptcy in 1994 because we had no way to pay the hospital. So we lost our son and went bankrupt in less than 2 years. So yes medical bills can destroy your life and your family's lives.
